title: editions + feature-gates + lint --future
manager: An editions mechanism (in the spirit of Rust's) plus feature-gates, so new language features can land on trunk turned off, ship dark, and get opted into per machine — and `lint --future` warns you about code that a coming edition will change. This is what lets FSL evolve on a single main branch without breaking existing machines: the breakage batches at era boundaries ride this mechanism, and authors migrate at their own pace instead of on a flag day.
cs: editions + feature-gate mechanism (§15); `lint --future` surfaces upcoming-edition changes; the vehicle for shipping waves dark on trunk (era-1 feature gates).
